discussant:
[INST] ### Reasoning:
 {theme}.
 Your opinion on the reasoning conclusion is: I {discussant_opinion}. 
 Task:
 - Read to the argument of {opponent.name} on the topic and decide if maintain to your opinion or change it. 
 ### Constraints: - At the end of each interaction decide if you 
- 'SUPPORT' {opponent.name} argument; 
 - 'REFUSE' {opponent.name} argument; 
 -  Write your response with the following format: "My original opinion was I {discussant_opinion} on the reasoning. After reading yor argument my conclusions are: I <SUPPORT|REFUSE> your argument because..."[/INST]
opponent:
[INST] You {opponent_opinion} on the provided input reasoning. Support your opinion by providing personal arguments.   
 ### Constraints: 
 - You must adhere tu your opinion ('{opponent_opinion}')
 - Write your response with the following format: "I {opponent_opinion} on the provided reasoning conclusions. I think that <argument>" [/INST]
